allow: PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "E:\\Code\\Web_c\\dist\\local-notice-radar.exe" -PassThru -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $result = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333/api/today" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 } catch { $null }; $proc.Kill\(\); if \($result\) { $result.Content } else { "FAILED" })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "E:\\Code\\Web_c\\dist\\local-notice-radar.exe" -PassThru -WindowStyle Normal; Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; $result = try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3333/api/today" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3 } catch { $null }; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }; if \($result\) { "SUCCESS: " + $result.Content } else { "FAILED" })
